tools.name: scan_url
tools.description: Run an AgentReady scan of a public URL. Returns the 0-100 score, per-phase findings, top priorities, and the Fix Pack v2 implementation contract. Repository paths remain candidate targets until a connected-repository resolver proves them.

tools.name: get_fix_pack
tools.description: Scan a public URL and return Fix Pack v2: prioritized fixes with stable ids, observed evidence, candidate target URLs and repository paths, review gates, and fix-specific acceptance assertions for a coding agent.

tools.name: verify_fixes
tools.description: Re-scan a public URL and evaluate fix-specific stable ids from a previous v1 or v2 Fix Pack. A fix closes when its finding id is absent; score delta is secondary evidence only.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "scan_url" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Run an AgentReady scan of a public URL. Returns the 0-100 score, per-phase findings, and top priorities. Use get_fix_pack for machine-readable fixes." → after: "Run an AgentReady scan of a public URL. Returns the 0-100 score, per-phase findings, top priorities, and the Fix Pack v2 implementation contract. Repository paths remain candidate targets until a connected-repository resolver proves them."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_fix_pack" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Scan a public URL and return the Fix Pack: prioritized fixes with stable ids, severity, exact remediation, and acceptance criteria — designed for a coding agent to implement." → after: "Scan a public URL and return Fix Pack v2: prioritized fixes with stable ids, observed evidence, candidate target URLs and repository paths, review gates, and fix-specific acceptance assertions for a coding agent."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "verify_fixes" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Re-scan a public URL and diff against a previous Fix Pack: which fix ids resolved, which remain, what the score delta is. Pass the previous fix pack (or at least its fixes[].id list and score)." → after: "Re-scan a public URL and evaluate fix-specific stable ids from a previous v1 or v2 Fix Pack. A fix closes when its finding id is absent; score delta is secondary evidence only."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
